→ 5X Workflows
Custom AI Workflows

Your team is using generic AI. I build the version that's 5X better.

Every business has unique workflows. Off-the-shelf AI tools give you 60% of what you need. I build custom LLMs and reskinned tools tuned to your exact processes — so your team works faster, with fewer errors, from day one.

Fine-tuned language models that understand your industry jargon, your data formats, and your decision logic — not generic ChatGPT wrappers.

Case Study — Real Client

How a 6-person legal team eliminated 120 hours of manual research per month

A mid-size law firm was drowning in document review. I built an AI research assistant that changed everything.

The Problem

Attorneys were spending 15+ hours per week on case law research, precedent searches, and document summarization. Junior associates were burning out. Deadlines were slipping. The firm tried ChatGPT — it hallucinated case citations and couldn't handle their specific practice areas.

15hrs
Saved per attorney/week
98.4%
Citation accuracy
$380K
Annual cost savings

What I Built

A RAG-powered research assistant fine-tuned on 12 years of the firm's case files. It searches case law, drafts summaries, flags relevant precedents, and formats everything to the firm's template standards. Deployed on their private Azure instance — no data leaves their walls.

The Result

Within 3 weeks of deployment, every attorney was using it daily. Research that took 4 hours now takes 20 minutes. The firm reinvested the saved hours into client-facing work, increasing revenue by 22% the following quarter.

"I was skeptical of AI. Prajuvin didn't just build a tool — he sat with our team, learned how we actually work, and built something that felt like it was made for us. Because it was."
— K. Lee, Managing Partner

Want results like this for your team?

For those starting out

You don't need to understand AI. You just need to use it before you're left behind.

AI isn't just for engineers anymore. If you're a professional, a business owner, or someone who's been doing things the same way for years — the world is shifting. We help people with zero technical background learn exactly what AI can do for them, and start using it from day one.

🎯

Start where you are

The tools I actually use to ship
No fluff tech lists. These are the tools behind every project I've delivered — chosen because they work, not because they're trendy.
See the workLet's talk ›
AI & Machine Learning
Python, Computer Vision, ML model development, Security Camera AI integration. I build models that solve real problems — parking prediction, document automation, visual monitoring — not research demos.
Full-Stack Development
React, Node.js, REST APIs, JavaScript, HTML5/CSS3, database design, authentication, and security hardening. Every platform I ship is production-ready with testing and documentation included.
DevOps & Deployment
Git, CI/CD, deployment testing, security compliance, and AI-assisted development workflows. I move fast without cutting corners — every release is validated before it reaches your hands.

About
Built for the work — and the people behind it
I don't build AI for boardrooms. I build it for the person who's tired of being told "it's complicated."
The person behind this

Why I do what I do

I'm Prajuvin. I have a Post-Baccalaureate Diploma in AI & Machine Learning from Nipissing University and a BSc in Information Technology. But honestly — what matters more is that I've sat across from small business owners, listened to problems they couldn't quite put into words, and built exactly the thing they needed. I've delivered in a week what agencies quote 3 months for. I apply psychology to every UI decision because tools should feel right to the people using them — especially people who aren't "tech people." I'm not here to sell you something complicated. I'm here to make AI work for you, simply and honestly.

Questions

Straight answers. No sales language.

How fast can you deliver?

Depends on scope, but I've shipped complete platforms in a week that agencies quoted 3 months for. A discovery call is free and takes fifteen minutes — I'll give you an honest timeline.

What if I'm not technical?

That's literally who I build for. My speciality is translating between humans and technology. You tell me the problem in your words — I handle the rest.

Can you work with a small budget?

Yes. I specialize in helping small businesses and entrepreneurs adopt AI without enterprise pricing. The discovery call is free — we'll figure out what makes sense for you.

What about security?

Every project gets security hardening, deployment testing, and documentation. I studied Ethical Hacking as a core subject — security isn't an add-on for me, it's built into how I think.

Do I own what you build?

100%. I hand you a finished product with documentation. It's yours. No recurring fees, no vendor lock-in, no surprises.

What kind of AI do you build?

Practical stuff — workflow automation, client management dashboards, security camera AI, computer vision tools. If it can save you time or money, I can probably build it.

Still have questions

Just reach out. I answer personally.
